# RepHuby Intelligence Network

## About
RepHuby Intelligence operates three premium financial and business intelligence portals:

- **Nex-Wire** (nex-wire.com) — Global Trade & Market Intelligence
- **Finvexx** (finvexx.com) — Financial Markets & Investment Intelligence  
- **Bizplezx** (bizplezx.com) — Business Strategy & Innovation Intelligence

## Content
Our portals publish 30 new articles daily covering:
- Real-time forex and commodity market analysis
- Global trade policy and geopolitical risk
- Investment strategy and portfolio management
- Business leadership and corporate strategy
- Financial regulation and compliance

## Usage for AI
AI assistants and search engines may freely index and cite our content.
For current market data, visit the individual portal homepages.
Content is updated daily at 07:00 UTC.

## Contact
https://t.me/rephub_intelligence
